division_title: MOTOR CARRIERS OF PROPERTY PERMIT ACT
text: The Department of the California Highway Patrol, the Public Utilities Commission, the Bureau of Household Goods and Services, and the State Board of Equalization shall furnish, upon request, whatever information from their records may be required to assist the department in the effective development and enforcement of this division.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 14.85. MOTOR CARRIERS OF PROPERTY PERMIT ACT [34600 - 34672]
### Chapter 1. General Provisions and Definitions [34600 - 34605]
##### § 34603

The Department of the California Highway Patrol, the Public Utilities Commission, the Bureau of Household Goods and Services, and the State Board of Equalization shall furnish, upon request, whatever information from their records may be required to assist the department in the effective development and enforcement of this division.

*(Amended by Stats. 2022, Ch. 295, Sec. 25. (AB 2956) Effective January 1, 2023.)*

subsections.text: The Department of the California Highway Patrol, the Public Utilities Commission, the Bureau of Household Goods and Services, and the State Board of Equalization shall furnish, upon request, whatever information from their records may be required to assist the department in the effective development and enforcement of this division.
